routes.evidence: Vite root renders SovereignDashboard in Electron/Tauri-compatible shell.
Dashboard component exists but router route is not implemented.
Observatory panels exist inside maataa-ui; route is not implemented.
Local domain registry route reads SQLite/Electron domain records with browser preview fallback.
Unified local search route is wired with type/status filters, empty state, and blocked route badges.
Protected admin shell is wired with Admin-only role guard and fail-closed access.
Login route authenticates seed users through the local auth bridge and persists sessions.
Signup route creates local Viewer accounts and opens a persisted session.
Theme/runtime packages exist; route is not implemented.
Docs exist in repository; in-app docs route is not implemented.

features.evidence: SovereignDashboard now has cinematic header and ecosystem schematic.
Dashboard includes apps/crates/packages, offline cores, quadrants, archive flow.
Panels exist, but route/live orchestration is not complete.
Electron auth bridge stores users, sessions, and audit logs in local SQLite; browser fallback is preview-only.
SQLite product runtime migration and Electron auth store are active for the auth slice.
Telemetry pressure and chaos reports exist for loopback frames.
Electron exposes a real loopback SSE stream for runtime heartbeats; missing SSE/IPC connections report DEGRADED fallback instead of fake live.
Unified search index and Ctrl/Cmd+K command palette are wired to local product matrix, docs, states, blockers, and repo surfaces.
Local dev billing simulator stores products, entitlements, and invoices in SQLite and exposes role-gated summaries.
Admin analytics reads persisted audit, runtime, telemetry, invoice, and entitlement counts from the local store.
Production hardening matrix and evidence reports are generated locally.
Golden image verification reads hardening matrix and refuses false PASS.
Electron shell launches local Vite UI with loopback-only request gate.
GitHub Actions verify workflow added for local gates.
